tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsFederationsCreate
tools.description: Creates a metastore federation in a project and location.

tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsFederationsList
tools.description: Lists federations in a project and location.

tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsOperationsCancel
tools.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to Code.CANCELLED.

tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsOperationsList
tools.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns UNIMPLEMENTED.

tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsServicesBackupsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new backup in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsServicesBackupsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a single backup.

tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsServicesBackupsGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsServicesBackupsList
tools.description: Lists backups in a service.

tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsServicesBackupsSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy.Can return NOT_FOUND, INVALID_ARGUMENT, and PERMISSION_DENIED errors.

tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsServicesCreate
tools.description: Creates a metastore service in a project and location.

tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsServicesExportMetadata
tools.description: Exports metadata from a service.

tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsServicesList
tools.description: Lists services in a project and location.

tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsServicesMetadataImportsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new MetadataImport in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsServicesMetadataImportsGet
tools.description: Gets details of a single import.

tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsServicesMetadataImportsList
tools.description: Lists imports in a service.

tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsServicesMetadataImportsPatch
tools.description: Updates a single import. Only the description field of MetadataImport is supported to be updated.

tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsServicesRestore
tools.description: Restores a service from a backup.

tools.name: projects.metastoreProjectsLocationsServicesTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a NOT_FOUND error.Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
